title: hieracium incisum subsp. longisubulatum
intro: Hieracium incisum subsp. longisubulatum, a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, is a flowering perennial native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Hieracium incisum subsp. longisubulatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support digestive health.
